scripts.build: esbuild src/index.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/overseer.mjs --external:better-sqlite3 --define:self=globalThis --loader:.js=jsx --loader:.jsx=jsx --jsx=automatic --jsx-import-source=react --banner:js="import{createRequire}from'module';const require=createRequire(import.meta.url);" && cp node_modules/yoga-wasm-web/dist/yoga.wasm dist/yoga.wasm
